description: Expand packages/shared-ui with advanced frontend infrastructure: state management, router, form library, animation library, drag-and-drop, virtualized list, rich text editor, charts, map, and more
steps: Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/types.ts - Types for all advanced systems: Store, Action, Reducer, Selector, Middleware, Route, RouteMatch, RouteGuard, FormState, FormField, ValidationRule, AnimationConfig, Spring, Keyframe, DragState, DropZone, VirtualItem, ScrollState, EditorState, EditorNode, ChartConfig, DataPoint, MapTile, Marker, Cluster, BreakpointConfig, ThemeConfig, CommandAction, ShortcutBinding

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/state-manager.ts - Redux-like state management: createStore, dispatch, subscribe, getState, combineReducers, selectors with memoization, middleware pipeline (thunk, logger), action creators, time-travel debugging support. ~500 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/router.ts - Client-side router: path matching with params (/:id), query string parsing, nested routes, route guards (auth, role), lazy loading support, navigation history, programmatic navigation, route transitions. ~450 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/form-library.ts - Form state management: field registration, validation (sync/async), field arrays (add/remove/reorder), conditional fields, dirty/touched tracking, form submission, error messages, schema-based validation. ~450 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/animation-engine.ts - Spring physics animation (mass, tension, friction), keyframe animations, gesture-based animations, stagger effects, animation composition, easing functions library, animation timeline. ~450 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/drag-drop.ts - Drag and drop system: sortable lists, kanban board support, file drop zones, drag preview, drop indicators, auto-scroll, nested drop targets, accessibility (keyboard DnD). ~400 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/virtual-list.ts - Windowed rendering for 100K+ items: variable height support, dynamic measurement, scroll position restoration, overscan, sticky items, infinite scroll integration, bidirectional rendering. ~450 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/rich-text-editor.ts - ContentEditable wrapper: block types (paragraph, heading, list, code, quote), inline formatting (bold, italic, link), mentions (@user), embeds (images, videos), markdown shortcuts, undo/redo, selection management. ~500 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/date-picker.ts - Calendar component logic: month/year navigation, date range selection, time slot picker, timezone support, locale-aware formatting, disabled dates, min/max dates, week start configuration. ~400 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/charts-engine.ts - SVG-based charts: line chart (interpolation, area fill), bar chart (stacked, grouped), pie/donut chart, scatter plot, radar chart, funnel chart, data normalization, axis calculation, tooltips, legends. ~500 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/map-engine.ts - Map tile rendering: tile loading/caching, markers with clustering, route polylines, heatmap overlay, viewport management, zoom/pan, coordinate systems (lat/lng to pixels), gesture handling. ~450 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/infinite-scroll.ts - Intersection observer-based infinite scroll, bi-directional loading, loading states, error recovery, item recycling, scroll anchoring. ~300 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/image-gallery.ts - Gallery with lightbox: grid layout, swipe navigation, zoom/pinch, lazy loading, thumbnail strip, keyboard navigation, preloading adjacent. ~350 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/skeleton-loader.ts - Skeleton screen system: shimmer animation, shape primitives (rect, circle, text line), composition, responsive skeletons, content-aware placeholders. ~250 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/toast-system.ts - Toast/snackbar notifications: queue management, auto-dismiss, action buttons, stacking, position variants, animation in/out, priority levels, persistence. ~300 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/command-palette.ts - Cmd+K style: fuzzy search, action registration, keyboard navigation, sections/groups, recent items, shortcut display, nested commands, context-aware actions. ~400 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/keyboard-shortcuts.ts - Shortcut registration, combo detection (Ctrl+Shift+K), scope management (global/component), conflict detection, shortcut help display, mac/windows normalization. ~300 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/responsive-hooks.ts - Breakpoint hooks: useBreakpoint, useMediaQuery, responsive values, container queries, orientation detection, safe area insets, dynamic viewport units. ~250 lines

Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/theme-engine.ts - CSS variable generation, dynamic theming, dark/light/high-contrast modes, color palette generation, spacing/typography scales, component token system, theme persistence. ~350 lines
Create packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/index.ts - Barrel export for all advanced modules
Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts to also export from './advanced'
acceptance_criteria: packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/index.ts exists and exports all advanced systems
StateManager implements createStore with middleware pipeline and memoized selectors
Router supports parameterized paths, guards, and nested routes
AnimationEngine implements spring physics with configurable mass/tension/friction
VirtualList handles 100K+ items with variable height windowed rendering
RichTextEditor supports block types, inline formatting, mentions, and embeds
ChartsEngine generates SVG path data for line, bar, pie, and scatter charts
All files are 250-500 lines with real implementations
findings: All 20 files created successfully (types.ts, state-manager.ts, router.ts, form-library.ts, animation-engine.ts, drag-drop.ts, virtual-list.ts, rich-text-editor.ts, date-picker.ts, charts-engine.ts, map-engine.ts, infinite-scroll.ts, image-gallery.ts, skeleton-loader.ts, toast-system.ts, command-palette.ts, keyboard-shortcuts.ts, responsive-hooks.ts, theme-engine.ts, index.ts). Updated packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts with export. Total 8823 lines added. Verification passed: 269,707 total lines across ecosystem.
